findings.summary: LD1 (Device:LED) misclassified as inductor instead of LED
findings.details: LD1 has lib_id 'Device:LED', keywords 'LED diode', value 'Blue', and footprint 'LED_SMD:LED_0603_1608Metric', but is classified as type='inductor' and category='inductor' in both the components list and BOM. The classifier is likely keying off the 'LD' reference prefix rather than the lib_id or keywords. The BOM also incorrectly buckets LD1 under component_types 'inductor: 1' instead of 'led: 1'. This bug likely affects all rev2 miniboard schematics as well, since they share the same LED symbol.

findings.summary: USB differential pair correctly detected with series resistors on ATmega32U4
findings.details: The analyzer correctly identifies the USB_D+ / USB_D- differential pair, associates them with U1 (ATmega32U4-A), reports series_resistors R3 and R4 (22-ohm on each line), and marks has_esd=true. The 5.1k CC resistors (R1, R2, R6) used for USB-C configuration are also present in the design and correctly captured in the BOM.
